products.name: The Alabaster Habesha Kemis
products.description: Hand-loomed cotton Habesha dress adorned with pure hand-stitched golden 'tilet' embroidery. A true cultural statement of premium heritage craftsmanship.

products.name: The Terracotta Linen Suit
products.description: Double-breasted unstructured blazer matched with wide-legged tailored trousers. Spun from high-density, breathable Italian organic linen.

products.name: The Obsidian Boubou
products.description: A fluid, ankle-length unstructured boubou crafted with premium heavyweight silk-crepe. Designed for seamless comfort and sophisticated silhouettes.

products.name: The Sage Green Kaftan
products.description: Features dynamic drop-shoulders, continuous sleeve designs, and delicate white threadwork bordering the neckline. Perfectly blends heritage and comfort.

products.name: Monochrome Wool Trench
products.description: Heavyweight double-faced wool wrap trench with a wide-notched lapel and dynamic tie belt. Perfect seasonal layering piece with structural drop sleeves.

products.name: Desert Knit Hooded Lounger
products.description: Luxuriously soft hooded sweater spun from carded Mongolian cashmere and premium cotton fibers. Features custom ribbed cuffs and an relaxed body fit.
